title: BanG Dream! Episode of Roselia I: Promise
original_title: BanG Dream! Episode of Roselia I: 約束
overview: Yukina Minato gathers members intertwined with different thoughts to form a band and participate at the Future World Fes. This is the story of their "promise" from their formation to the challenge of the music festival.
